item.title: Keeping WSL Alive
item.description: WSL is one of my favorite Windows tools, but it tends to shut itself down quicker than expected.

Hi, I’m Jake! I’m a software engineer and I recently moved to Israel. I like to building things that help make sense of the vast amount of data that flows through the international network of networks. My experience started with robotics, but has moved through everything including: green energy, video games, financial applications.
